# crates/attractor-tools

Provides `Tool` trait, `ToolRegistry`, `ExecutionEnvironment`, and built-in tool implementations for Attractor agents. Sandbox-backed filesystem and shell execution. Consumed by `attractor-cli` and pipeline handlers via `attractor-types` shared types.

## Contents

[lib.rs](./lib.rs) — Re-exports `Tool`, `ToolDefinition`, `ToolRegistry`, `ExecutionEnvironment`, `LocalExecutionEnvironment`, `ToolProfile`, `truncate_output`, and all 6 built-in tools

[tool.rs](./tool.rs) — `Tool` async trait (`execute + definition`), `ToolDefinition` struct (serde-serializable JSON schema), `ToolRegistry` (HashMap-backed registry)

[environment.rs](./environment.rs) — `ExecutionEnvironment` trait; `ExecResult`, `DirEntry`, `GrepOptions` structs

[local_env.rs](./local_env.rs) — `LocalExecutionEnvironment` impl: tokio fs, ripgrep/regex fallback, SIGTERM timeout, env var filtering

[profiles.rs](./profiles.rs) — `ToolProfile` factory: `anthropic()`, `openai()`, `gemini()`; `build_registry()` maps names to built-in tool instances

[truncation.rs](./truncation.rs) — `truncate_output(&str, usize, TruncationMode)` with `HeadTail` (40/60 split) and `Tail` modes; UTF-8 boundary-safe helpers

## Subdirectories

[builtin/](./builtin/) — 6 `impl Tool` structs: `ReadFileTool`, `WriteFileTool`, `EditFileTool`, `ShellTool`, `GrepTool`, `GlobTool`

## Architecture

```
ToolRegistry
    └── Tool (trait)
            └── definition() -> ToolDefinition
            └── execute(Value, &dyn ExecutionEnvironment) -> Result<String>

ExecutionEnvironment (trait)
    ├── read_file, write_file, file_exists
    ├── list_directory, glob_files, grep
    ├── exec_command, working_directory, platform

LocalExecutionEnvironment ──► impl ExecutionEnvironment
    └── tokio::fs + ripgrep/regex + process spawn
```

## Tool Limits

| Tool | Max Chars | Mode |
|------|-----------|------|
| `ReadFileTool` | 50,000 | `HeadTail` |
| `ShellTool` | 30,000 | `HeadTail` |
| `GrepTool` | 20,000 | `Tail` |
| `GlobTool` | 20,000 | `Tail` |

## Behavioral Contracts

- **`edit_file`** errors with `"N times"` when `old_string` appears multiple times
- **`ReadFileTool`** formats output with `"N | line"` line number prefix
- **`WriteFileTool`** returns `"N bytes"` and file path
- **`ShellTool`** returns `"Exit code: N"` and stdout
- **`truncate_output`** inserts `"[WARNING: Output truncated. N characters removed from middle/start]"`

## Env Filtering

`LocalExecutionEnvironment::filtered_env()` excludes vars matching `*(_api_key|_secret|_token|_password|_credential)` (case-insensitive). Always preserves: `PATH`, `HOME`, `USER`, `SHELL`, `LANG`, `TERM`, `TMPDIR`.

## Stack

Rust 2021 edition, tokio async runtime, async-trait for async trait support, globset + regex for pattern matching.
